benefits.description: Down from 220-225 lbs to 180 lbs since June; BMI was 35%, carried a lot of midsection fat for 35-40 years
Increased metabolism gauged by thermogenic use; now feels much warmer and requires significantly lower AC temperatures

side_effects.description: Increased body temperature / heat sensitivity; previously comfortable at 78-80F inside, now needs 74F minimum and finds 68F divine

protocol_notes: BMI was 35 at 220-225 lbs, 5'9". Used tesamorelin specifically for visceral fat targeting alongside CJC and Ipamorelin in the morning. Trio intended to increase GH release and metabolism. Lost ~40-45 lbs since June. Protocol started around June of the post year.
